P0 Board directive 2026-04-19: internal state does not flow to external repo. Today 0 commits all session; origin/main HEAD = 978d4da4 @ 08:00, local = same HEAD with many working-tree modifications. Required design: (1) hash+mtime-based auto-commit trigger every N minutes with sanity check (no commit if failing tests, no commit if CROBA violations within last N min) (2) semi-auto push that respects Board Decision Rules (commit/push to main = CEO or CTO authority per AGENTS.md:948; eng-* roles never push) (3) CIEU event emission on each commit/push cycle (4) integration with session_close_yml.py to ensure session close always flushes (5) preserve manual workflow — auto-push must be overridable and must never push incomplete / mid-edit state. Architectural review by Ethan expected to happen as part of CZL-BRAIN-AUTO-INGEST ruling (both are 'internal state → external' governance gaps). Implementation owner: Ryan-Platform after Ethan rules. NO git push during implementation itself (obviously).

P0 Board directive 2026-04-19: brain currently passive (structurally capable but not wired into decision flow). Board question '工作时是否真的在通过大脑工作' answer: no. Fix = 3-loop live architecture. Loop 3: periodic dream consolidation on Board offline >=4h OR session close (aiden_dream.py exists, scheduling inactive). Architectural review should merge with CZL-BRAIN-AUTO-INGEST ruling as joint ingest+live scope — Ethan ruling to specify: (a) which hook event pre-query fires on (UserPromptSubmit vs PreToolUse) (b) write-back schema for activation_log entry (c) Hebbian increment policy (capped 1.0, decay constant) (d) dream trigger condition + idempotency guard. Implementation: Ryan (hook wiring), Leo (semantic/Hebbian layer), Maya (dream integration). NO git push.

Board 2026-04-19 consultant insight: pre-hook escape samples (611 pure + 52K warn-as-escape) are SYSTEM BLINDSPOT COORDINATES, not rule-edge-case failures. My CEO spec treated them as negative-pull (weight -0.3) which moves brain AWAY from these coordinates. That's the opposite of what we want — they're precious teaching signal showing where governance WAS blind. Required: (1) revise bipartite loader to split escape into pre-hook (positive-learning signal: 'remember these blindspots') vs post-hook (negative-pull for rule-edge-case). (2) add to Leo Phase 2 spec open questions for Ethan arch re-review. (3) update CEO spec Section 3.4 with this reversal + citation to Board consultant. Owner: CEO for spec update + Ethan for architectural re-ruling + Leo for loader semantics. NO git push.

Board 2026-04-19 directive (inspired by gbrain zero-LLM auto-extraction): extend brain ingestion to auto-create nodes/edges from CIEU events. Our structured fields make this easier than gbrain's free-text case. Auto-extract 6 entity types (Agent / Rule / File / Tool / Command / Session) and 6 relation types (triggered_rule / touches_file / dispatches_to / blocked_by / co-touched-with / co-fired-with). Frequency thresholds: entity ≥3 occurrences, edge ≥2. Rare-tail kept in separate staging table. Integrates into CZL-BRAIN-AUTO-INGEST boundary (c)+(d) — extends scan source from files-only to files+CIEU. Hebbian seeding: co-occurrence count becomes initial edge weight (capped 0.3 — manual curation still bounded). Gated on Leo#2 add_node fix + Ethan Q8 access_count-increment fix landing first. Architectural review by Ethan required. Implementation owner: Leo-Kernel (semantic extraction logic) + Ryan-Platform (hook+scheduler integration). NO git push.

P1: Build L2 outcome-weighted Hebbian write-back module. P1: Implement cieu_bipartite_learner.py per CTO CZL-BRAIN-BIPARTITE-P2-ALGO-ruling.md (7 sections H.1-H.7). Leo-Kernel scope. Key parameters: LAMBDA_CONTRASTIVE=0.5 fixed, RADIUS_MULTIPLIER=0.5 with diagnostic assertion (median relevance>=20), checkpoint in aiden_brain.db node_checkpoints table (retain last 20), time-based held-out (last 7 days), Leo delta-from-old formula (supersedes CEO original), REWRITE gate excluded (3-condition gate, corpus>=50), escape semantic reversal (pre-hook +0.6 positive, post-hook -0.3 negative, PRE_HOOK_CUTOFF constant). Uses Leo normalizer v3 training_eligible field. Batch composition: pre_hook_escape joins positive pool, escape 5pct floor uses post-hook first, backfill pre-hook at -0.1. Emit BIPARTITE_RADIUS_DIAGNOSTIC + BIPARTITE_REWRITE_GATE_CLOSED CIEU events. Depends on L2 Hebbian being live (Card 1). Success: run 1 pass on current CIEU corpus, KL divergence computed on 7-day held-out, checkpoint saved, no assertion fires. NO git commit/push/add/reset.

P1: Maya-Governance scope. Build dominance monitor per CEO v2 Section 4, CTO-ratified thresholds 10pct and 20pct. Compute per L1 query: fraction of last 100 L1 queries where node X was top-1. If X exceeds 10pct: emit BRAIN_NODE_DOMINANCE_WARNING with node_id and frequency. If X exceeds 20pct: emit BRAIN_NODE_DOMINANCE_ALERT and reduce X effective weight by 50pct in next 50 queries (transient suppression). Report to CEO via next boot report if more than 3 alerts in 30 days. Use sliding window of last 100 queries (not time-based). Integrate into hook_ceo_pre_output_brain_query.py call path -- monitor runs after L1 query returns top-k, before injection. New file brain_dominance_monitor.py with DominanceTracker class. Store query history in aiden_brain.db dominance_log table (query_id, top1_node_id, timestamp). Success: inject 100 synthetic queries with 15 hitting same node then warning fires, 25 hitting same node then alert fires plus weight suppression applied. NO git commit/push/add/reset.
